positive: A hyper-detailed vector illustration of a stylized, whimsical forest scene. Focus on bioluminescent flora, giant oversized mushrooms, meandering roots, and stylized forest creatures (such as gentle deer and foxes) rendered in clean, graphic silhouettes. The color palette should be rich jewel tones—deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, amethyst purples, and pops of ethereal gold. Composition must be perfectly circular and symmetrical, designed as a repeat pattern or central motif suitable for apparel. Strong contrast between the deep shadows and glowing elements. Style should be modern folk art meets celestial tapestry, highly defined, tattoo flash aesthetic, crisp vector line work, high contrast, 8k resolution.
negative: blurry, artifact, watermark, text, low detail, noise, dirty, monochrome, realistic photograph, gradient fade, excessive color variation, logos, trademarks
